debug_info.goal:
r : ℝ
hr : r ≥ 0
⊢ HasFiniteIntegral (Φ₂ r) (volume.restrict (Icc 0 1))

failed_attempts: simpa [IntegrableOn, integrableOn_subtype] using Φ₂_hasFiniteIntegral (r := r) hr

simpa [Measure.restrict_restrict, inter_eq_left.mpr (by
    intro x hx
    exact hx.1)] using (Φ₂_hasFiniteIntegral hr)

have hcont : ContinuousOn (Φ₂ r) (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) := Φ₂_contDiffOn.continuousOn
  exact (hasFiniteIntegral_restrict_of_bounded hcont measurableSet_Icc).2
    (measure_Icc_lt_top : (volume (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) < ⊤))

have hcont : ContinuousOn (Φ₂ r) (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :=
    Φ₂_contDiffOn.continuousOn
  have hbound : ∃ C, ∀ x ∈ Icc (0 : ℝ) 1, ‖Φ₂ r x‖ ≤ C := by
    simpa using (hcont.norm.bddAbove (isCompact_Icc : IsCompact (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1)))
  rcases hbound with ⟨C, hC⟩
  exact (hasFiniteIntegral_of_bounded (volume.restrict (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1)) C
    (by
      intro x hx
      exact hC x hx)
    (by
      simpa using (measure_Icc_lt_top (0 : ℝ) (1 : ℝ)))

have hcont : ContinuousOn (Φ₂ r) (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :=
    Φ₂_contDiffOn.continuousOn
  have hcont' : ContinuousOn (fun x => ‖Φ₂ r x‖) (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :=
    (continuous_norm.comp_continuousOn hcont)
  have hbound : ∃ C, ∀ x ∈ Icc (0 : ℝ) 1, ‖Φ₂ r x‖ ≤ C := by
    rcases (isCompact_Icc : IsCompact (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1)).exists_bound_of_continuousOn hcont' with
      ⟨C, hC⟩
    exact ⟨C, hC⟩
  rcases hbound with ⟨C, hC⟩
  have hfinite : (volume.restrict (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1)) (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) < ∞ := by
    simpa [Measure.restrict_apply, measurableSet_Icc] using (measure_Icc_lt_top (0 : ℝ) 1)
  refine (hasFiniteIntegral_of_bounded_of_fin_measurableSet (s := Icc (0 : ℝ) 1)
    (f := Φ₂ r) (μ := volume) ?_ ?_ ?_).2
  · exact measurableSet_Icc
  · refine ⟨C, ?_⟩
    intro x hx
    exact hC x hx
  · simpa using hfinite

simpa [Measure.restrict_restrict, inter_assoc, inter_self, inter_comm, inter_left_comm] using
    (Φ₂_hasFiniteIntegral hr)

simpa [IntegrableOn, measure.restrict_restrict, inter_eq_left.mpr (by
    intro x hx
    exact hx)] using (Φ₂_hasFiniteIntegral (r := r) hr)

have hcont : ContinuousOn (Φ₂ r) (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :=
    Φ₂_contDiffOn.continuousOn
  have hmeas : MeasurableSet (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) := measurableSet_Icc
  have hcompact : IsCompact (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) := isCompact_Icc
  exact (hcompact.hasFiniteIntegral_of_continuousOn hmeas hcont)

have hcont : ContinuousOn (Φ₂ r) (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) := Φ₂_contDiffOn.continuousOn
  have hIcc : (volume (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1)) < ∞ := by
    simpa [Real.volume_Icc] using (ENNReal.ofReal_lt_top : (ENNReal.ofReal ((1 : ℝ) - 0)) < ⊤)
  exact (hcont.hasFiniteIntegral_of_bounded measurableSet_Icc hIcc).1
simpa [IntegrableOn, hr] using Φ₂_hasFiniteIntegral (r := r) hr

have hcont : ContinuousOn (Φ₂ r) (Icc (0 : ℝ) 1) :=
    Φ₂_contDiffOn.continuousOn
  exact hcont.hasFiniteIntegral_of_bounded (s := Icc (0 : ℝ) 1)
    (by simpa using measurableSet_Icc) (by simp)
